description: SKOS-aware hierarchical view of site concepts. Joins vocabulary.json (skos:broader/narrower edges) with pages.json (each page's concepts:[] array) to render a nested <details> tree rooted at top concepts.

attributes.name: data-lens-src
attributes.description: URL to pages.json. Each page record must expose a concepts:[] array (per meta-tag-contract v1.1).

attributes.name: data-vocabulary-src
attributes.description: URL to the SKOS vocabulary.json. Provides concept @id, skos:prefLabel, and skos:broader/narrower/hasTopConcept edges used to build the tree.

attributes.name: expand-all
attributes.description: Render with every level expanded. Default opens only the top-level concepts.

structure.description: Generated. One <details> per concept node. data-topic-node carries the concept @id (or '__uncategorized'). Native disclosure widgets work without JS.
Generated. Total page count for the concept and all descendant concepts.
Generated. Pages tagged directly with this concept, in source order.
Rendered when either data source fails to load.
